title: ctenodon paucifolius
intro: Ctenodon paucifolius, also known as the few-leaved ctenodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which are said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenodon paucifolius include reducing fever, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues in traditional medicine.
